reviews.review_description: The games screen goes blank blank as in gray which it completely unecceptable since ive only owned the game alittle about sixty minutes.

I purchased this game, thought it might be fun,game doesn't say enjoy the experience as stated in the YouTube walkthrough ,just says start when in menu, thor's hammer is supposed to get stolen as the game starts and the chase is on, well whatever that is supposed to steal hammer never comes out,.

developer_response.body: Hi There, you are looking at a video of a different version of this game on Youtube :) Just open the menu in game and there are directions on the screen in front of you. Enjoy!

reviews.review_description: I've got both coasters from this dev, and this one is far superior to Hades' Wrath.  Specifically, this coaster has an interactive option where you collect/shoot stuff while riding.  This mechanic is well-designed and really fun.  I own all the Epic Roller Coaster stuff and although I consider it the "gold-standard" for VR coasters, the interactive mode here is more fun.  That said, this coaster suffers from the same complaints as Hades' Wrath--no haptic feedback being the biggest disappointment.  Some minor graphic glitches could & should be fixed in a patch IF the dev is serious.  This dev has a big opportunity to create a rival to Epic Roller Coasters, but it remains to be seen if they follow through.  The interactive experience here is very fun--I hope they patch the glitches and focus on the strengths evident in Thor's Hammer if they release more DLC.

I bought the bundle with both. These are my third and fourth roller coaster games/experiences that I have purchased on my oculus.  I have to say they are my favorites. The graphics are much better in my opinion. One review stated that one was lacking the sound of the  roller coaster itself, and that’s true,  but that’s an easy fix for the creators.  each one consist of just one ride, but they are pretty long. It is a fantasy environment so don’t expect it to be “realistic”, but it’s pretty cool. It’s definitely worth the money and I would recommend buying the bundle 👍👍
I'm just there. Nothing is happening I am shooting at everything. the game won't start

developer_response.body: Hi There, I think you may have been confused by our menu. We have now made it clear where to click if you would like to retry. Thanks for the feedback. We are always trying to improve our experience.

reviews.review_description: I really enjoyed this. Two modes, one which is just a coaster and one which is a shooter/ collector mode. Graphics are cool. Very immersive and fun.
This was fun and I’ve tried a lot of coasters on VR! Lots of scenes and I was fully immersed. Hard to get a good coaster but this hit the spot.
